source.body_text_sample:
Careers
Join the Sunset Grill family
VIEW MENUABOUTLOCATIONSFRANCHISINGCAREERSGIFT CARDSCATERINGCONTACT US
Our Philosophy

At Sunset Grill, we believe in family, balance, and building a workplace people genuinely enjoy being part of. This is more than just a job with a paycheque every two weeks; it’s a place where your time and effort are respected.

By focusing on what we do best, serving great breakfast and lunch, we create a fast-paced, positive environment with consistent hours, strong teamwork, and reliable earnings. Our approach leads to low staff turnover and a supportive culture where our team members can thrive.

If you’re dependable, energetic, and enjoy working in a busy, guest-focused setting, Sunset Grill could be a great fit for you.

Explore current opportunities and find out how you can grow your career with Sunset Grill.

Current Opportunities

If you’re a dedicated, hardworking individual, we have a place for you on our team!
We encourage applicants to apply in-person at any of our locations.

VIEW CURRENT OPPORTUNITIES
About Our Positions

We always welcome resumes for cooks, dishwashers, servers, and various support staff. To apply, please contact the restaurant directly. Sunset Grill welcomes applications from people with disabilities. Accommodations are available on request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection process.
